since_last: 55% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.23%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -3.13% · Gold -1.22% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 55% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.23%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.23%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +13.54%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.56% at $185.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.56% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
